queries.question: What debt obligations have a price of 1000 and what mortgage obligations have the same price?
queries.sql:
SELECT Structured_Financial_Products.Name 
FROM Structured_Financial_Products
WHERE (Structured_Financial_Products.Type = "Collateralized Debt Obligation" OR Structured_Financial_Products.Type = "Collateralized Mortgage Obligation") AND Structured_Financial_Products.Price = 1000.0
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?structured_financial_products a :Structured_Financial_Products .
  ?structured_financial_products p:name ?name .
  ?structured_financial_products p:Type ?type_w .
  ?structured_financial_products p:Type ?type_w2 .
  ?structured_financial_products p:Price ?price_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?type_w) = "Collateralized Debt Obligation" || STR(?type_w2) = "Collateralized Mortgage Obligation")) && (STR(?price_w) = "1000" || STR(?price_w) = "1000.0")))
}

queries.question: Show debt obligations and mortgage obligations with a price of 1000.
queries.sql:
SELECT Structured_Financial_Products.Name 
FROM Structured_Financial_Products
WHERE Structured_Financial_Products.Type = "Collateralized Debt Obligation" OR Structured_Financial_Products.Type = "Collateralized Mortgage Obligation" AND Structured_Financial_Products.Price = 1000.0
